subject: A lithe humanoid figure leaping through a forest canopy, one hand outstretched, the other gripping a small bladed weapon
description: A humanoid figure with braided or locked hair launches forward through a sun-dappled forest canopy, body fully extended in a leap. One arm is outstretched ahead, the other hand grips a small claw-like or bladed implement. Clothing is a mix of wrap and armored pieces. The setting is lush — massive tree trunks in warm golden light, branches and foliage filling the frame. The composition is dynamic, the figure caught mid-leap between trees at a high angle. Expression is visible: open-mouthed, focused, aggressive.
foreground: Humanoid figure mid-leap through forest canopy, claw-weapon in hand
background: Sun-lit forest, massive tree trunks, golden dappled light
